query:
UPDATE watering_plans SET
            date = $2,
            description = $3,
            status = $4,
            cancellation_note = $5,
            distance = $6,
            total_water_required = $7,
            refill_count = $8,
            duration = $9,
            provider = $10,
            additional_informations = $11,
            route_geometry = ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($12::text),
            start_point_name = $13
        WHERE id = $1
